title: Sentry Span Attribute Schema
description: Describes an attribute and how it's meant to be used

key.description: The name of the attribute, for ex. http.route

has_dynamic_suffix.description: If an attribute has a dynamic suffix, for example http.response.header.<key> where <key> is dynamic

type.description: The type of the attribute value

apply_scrubbing.description: How PII scrubbing should be applied to the attribute value. 'auto' scrubs automatically, 'manual' requires manual scrubbing rules, 'never' is never scrubbed. Optionally include a reason about why this mode applies

example.description: An example value of the attribute

deprecation.description: If an attribute was deprecated, and what it was replaced with

_status.description: How the attribute should be handled in the ingestion pipeline. 'backfill' copies the value to the new name. 'normalize' moves the value to the new name. 'transform' applies the referenced attribute transformation. Existing values for the replacement attribute will not be overwritten. The attribute should be backfilled or transformed for 90 days before status is set to normalize.

transformation.description: The id of the attribute transformation to apply when _status is 'transform'. Transformation definitions live in model/attribute_transformations/.

alias.description: If there are attributes that alias to this attribute

search_aliases.description: Public search aliases and their mappings to Sentry span datasets

public_alias.description: The public name exposed in Sentry search

internal_name.description: The internal attribute name used by the EAP search resolver

search_type.description: The type exposed by Sentry search, including unit-aware types

secondary_alias.description: Whether the alias is accepted for queries but omitted from autocomplete suggestions

private.description: Whether the internal attribute should be hidden from public search results

dataset_mappings.description: Exact query column mappings for Sentry's span datasets

spans.description: The column expression in the indexed spans dataset

eap.description: The column expression in the Events Analytics Platform dataset

additional_context.description: A list of freeform notes providing additional context about how this attribute behaves, common pitfalls, or query-time nuances

changelog.description: A list of changelog entries tracking how this attribute has changed across versions
